description_long: This is a semi-automatic handgun with a matte black slide and a contrasting light gray grip featuring a digital camouflage pattern and a fleur-de-lis emblem. The frame is robust and angular, with a squared-off trigger guard and a prominent beavertail at the rear. The slide has serrations at the rear for improved grip and visible engraved markings, including text and a logo. The barrel is standard length, flush with the slide, and does not appear to have threading or compensators. The magazine base is flat and slightly extended, matching the grip's color and pattern. Overall, the handgun has a modern, tactical appearance with ergonomic and aesthetic enhancements.
description: A modern semi-automatic handgun with a matte black slide, light gray digital camo grip, and engraved markings. Features include a squared trigger guard, fleur-de-lis emblem, and a flat magazine base.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the digital camo grip with a fleur-de-lis emblem, matte black slide, and detailed slide serrations.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, squared trigger guard, and the width of the slide and grip.
description_view_2: Right side view displaying engraved slide markings, the camo-patterned grip, and the overall profile of the handgun.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the beavertail, rear sight, and the backstrap of the grip.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured for ergonomic handling, featuring a light gray digital camouflage pattern and a prominent black fleur-de-lis emblem. Its surface appears slightly textured for improved grip, with subtle finger grooves and a flat base. The material looks like polymer with a matte finish, providing both comfort and slip resistance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is squared-off and robust, with a thick profile and a slight undercut for enhanced finger placement. It lacks additional texturing or reinforcement but stands out due to its angular, modern design, which may aid in tactical handling.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length, flush with the slide, and has a smooth, unthreaded profile. There are no visible compensators, ports, or external threading, and the finish matches the matte black of the slide.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features engraved markings on the right side, including a manufacturer or model name, caliber designation, and a logo. The engravings are clear and prominent, adding both identification and decorative detail to the firearm.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and slightly extended, matching the grip's light gray digital camo pattern. It is beveled for easier insertion and removal, with no visible finger rest or additional embellishments.
